issue_title: Empty notifications screen should revert to art
issue_body_preview:
On a fresh install, the notifications screen is empty and displays the nice textile art. However, after receiving and deleting a notification (from accepting an invite), the screen just goes all white. In the case, it should revert to showing the nice textile art.

![Screenshot_20190726-151853](ht
test_description_zh: 在应用中接收一条通知（例如接受邀请产生的通知），然后删除该通知，使通知列表变为空。观察通知页面在所有通知被删除后的显示状态。
expected_result_zh: 当所有通知被删除后，通知页面应显示精美的 Textile 艺术占位图（与全新安装时空通知页面的展示效果一致），而不是显示为全白空白页面。
